hero.title: Email Polisher
hero.description: Refine email drafts for clearer wording and a more appropriate tone.

differences.title: Improve the message while preserving its purpose
differences.description: Email Polisher helps turn an existing draft into a clearer, more considered email.

items.title: Draft-first workflow
items.description: Begin with the message and intent already written.

items.title: Tone refinement
items.description: Adjust how the message comes across to its reader.

items.title: Clearer wording
items.description: Improve readability before the email is sent.

feel.title: A final review before sending
feel.description: The workflow keeps attention on clarity, tone, and the original purpose of the email.

items.title: Add the draft
items.description: Start with the email you already intend to send.

items.title: Refine the message
items.description: Improve wording and tone while keeping the intent clear.

items.title: Review the result
items.description: Check the polished email before using it.

audiences.title: Who uses Email Polisher
audiences.description: Useful for anyone who wants more confidence in an email draft.

items.title: Students
items.description: Prepare clear emails for educators and organizations.

resourceSection.title: Email refinement essentials
